creator: glarkin@FreeBSD.org
text:
I am updating databases/drizzle to the latest version.  While
	testing the build in tinderbox, I received an error stating that
	/usr/local/share/locale/mr/LC_MESSAGES/drizzle.mo was left in
	the filesystem. This change adds that language code to the mtree
	file.

How-To-Repeat: 
	Within tinderbox, install/deinstall a port that uses Marathi
	(mr) language files and note the "leftover directories" error.
